name: repo-hygiene
description: Skills that keep a codebase healthy as agents work in it: orientation, docstrings, doc freshness, test coverage, and commit gates.

interface.shortDescription: Keep repos healthy: orientation, docstrings, doc freshness, tests, commit gates
interface.longDescription: Use Repo Hygiene to keep codebases healthy as agents work in them. Skills cover initial repo orientation, writing useful docstrings, keeping public-API docs fresh, ensuring new code paths have test coverage, and gating commits behind verification.
defaultPrompt: Help me keep this repo's docs and tests in sync as I work.
Before I commit, run the hygiene checks.
